name: Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in butter until tender in a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Beat eggs with milk, salt, and pepper sauce. Stir in rice, tomato, and chilies.
3. Pour mixture into the skillet. Reduce heat to medium-low.
4. Cover; cook until top is almost set, about 12 to 15 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with cheese. Cover, remove from heat, and let stand about 10 minutes.
Conventional Oven:
1. Combine eggs, milk, salt, and pepper sauce in a large bowl; whisk to blend.
2. Stir in rice, tomato, cheese, chilies, and onions. Pour into greased 10-inch baking dish.
3. Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean.
